hero.description: Peer-reviewed publications in rehabilitation measurement, neurophysiology, neuromodulation, biomechanics, and stroke recovery
hero.title: Publications

publications.summary: Evaluates the measurement properties of the Functional Balance Ability Measure across subacute neurologic diagnoses, supporting its use as a rehabilitation outcome tool
publications.title: Measurement Properties of the Functional Balance Ability Measure Across Subacute Neurologic Diagnoses

publications.summary: Introduces a measure of balance designed to span a broad range of functional mobility in persons post-stroke
publications.title: The Functional Balance Ability Measure

publications.summary: Examines how voluntary activation affects lower-extremity motor threshold responses, informing neurophysiological assessment approaches
publications.title: Systematic Evaluation of the Effects of Voluntary Activation on Lower Extremity Motor Thresholds

publications.summary: Studies neural excitability and functional status after neuromuscular electrical stimulation in patients with chronic ankle instability
publications.title: The Effects of Neuromuscular Electrical Stimulation to the Ankle Pronators

publications.summary: Investigates how short-term ankle immobilization affects neural excitability and lower-extremity kinematics
publications.title: The Effects of 72 Hours of Dynamic Ankle Immobilization

publications.summary: Describes a protocol for assessing lower-extremity neurophysiology in standing after stroke
publications.title: Standing Neurophysiological Assessment of Lower Extremity Muscles Post-Stroke

publications.summary: Compares motor evoked potential amplitude and latency approaches for lower-extremity hotspot identification after stroke
publications.title: Comparing Cortico-Motor Hotspot Identification Methods in the Lower Extremities Post-Stroke
